title: Mangione's lawyers plan psychiatric defence in state murder trial
description: They will argue he was suffering from "extreme emotional disturbance" at the time UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson was killed.
text: Lawyers for Luigi Mangione, the man accused of gunning down UnitedHealthcare Chief. Executive Brian Thompson, will argue a psychiatric defence at his state murder. Trial, a judge said on Wednesday. According to CBS News, the BBC's US news partner, Mangione's lawyers have. Told Judge Gregory Carro that they will try to show he was. Suffering from "extreme emotional disturbance at the time of the occurrence". He has pleaded not guilty in both the federal and. State cases against him for the shooting death of Thompson in midtown. Manhattan at the end of 2024. If a jury agrees with the psychiatric defence, then it could convict.
thai_text: ข่าวนี้จาก BBC News อยู่ในหมวดข่าวต่างประเทศ หัวข้อคือ “Mangione's lawyers plan psychiatric defence in state murder trial”. ใจความหลักคือ Lawyers for Luigi Mangione, the man accused of gunning down UnitedHealthcare Chief. Executive Brian Thompson, will argue a psychiatric defence at his state murder. Trial, a judge said on Wednesday. According to CBS News, the BBC's US news partner, Mangione's lawyers have. สรุปง่าย ๆ คือข่าวนี้เล่าว่าเกิดอะไรขึ้น ใครเกี่ยวข้อง และทำไมเรื่องนี้จึงควรติดตามต่อ. คำสำคัญที่ควรรู้: according = ตามข้อมูลจาก / accused = คำว่า accused / agrees = คำว่า agrees / argue = คำว่า argue / bbc's = คำว่า bbc's.
